about_quotes.speaker: Quentin Jackson
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] Chappie Willett. >> [INTERVIEWEE] Chappie Willett. ... [INTERVIEWER] Yeah, Chappie Willett. I think he was from Philadelphia. [INTERVIEWEE] He was.

about_quotes.speaker: Al Hall
about_quotes.evidence: Frank Fairfax had the big band that he took over from Chappie Willett... Chappie Willett was the ace arranger at that point and got the band together

about_quotes.speaker: Harry Edison
about_quotes.evidence: And they had one guy, Chappie Willett, he used to write such hard arrangements it would take so long to get these players together.

about_quotes.speaker: Jonah Jones
about_quotes.evidence: every now and then he'd have somebody else to make an arrangement, like Chappie Willett would make something sometimes
